llmTip: Returns information about the current e-conomic agreement/company, including company name, agreement number, and modules.
Returns paginated list of customers. Use filter param e.g. filter=name$like:*john* or filter=customerNumber$gte:100. Use pagesize (max 1000) and skippages for pagination.
Returns full details of a single customer by their customer number.
Returns paginated list of suppliers. Use filter param e.g. filter=name$like:*acme*.
Returns full details of a single supplier by number.
Returns paginated list of products. Use filter param e.g. filter=name$like:*widget*.
Returns full details of a single product by product number.
Returns paginated list of draft invoices.
Returns full details of a draft invoice.
Returns paginated list of booked (finalized) invoices.
Returns full details of a booked invoice.
Returns paginated list of draft orders.
Returns full details of a draft order.
Returns the chart of accounts. Use filter e.g. filter=accountType$eq:profitAndLoss.
Returns details of a single account by account number.
Returns list of journals (daybooks).
Returns details of a specific journal.
Returns paginated list of account entries (booked transactions). Use filter e.g. filter=account.accountNumber$eq:1000.
Returns list of payment terms available in the agreement.
Returns list of VAT zones.
Returns list of customer groups.
Returns list of supplier groups.
Returns list of product groups.
Returns list of units of measure.
Returns list of departments.
Returns list of currencies configured in the agreement.
Returns list of available document layouts.
Returns list of accounting years (e.g. 2024, 2025, 2026). Use to discover valid year values for other accounting-year endpoints.
Returns details of a specific accounting year including its periods.
Returns the periods (months) for a given accounting year. Each period has a periodNumber (1-12), fromDate, and toDate.

Returns all booked entries for a specific period in an accounting year. Use year (e.g. 2026) and periodNumber (e.g. 3 for March). Supports filter, sort, pagesize, skippages. Essential for fetching monthly transaction data for trial balance and reporting.
Returns all booked entries for an entire accounting year.
Returns account totals (balances) for an accounting year. Useful for trial balance / råbalance reports.
